trades.reasoning: Top screener score (100) with RSI in the ideal bullish zone at 65.1 — not overbought, MACD bullish crossover, price well above SMA-20, and a volume surge confirming institutional interest; deploying remaining cash into the strongest clean-momentum candidate.

decisions.briefing: Markets are risk-on today with NASDAQ +0.8% and S&P 500 +0.6%, broad-based strength favoring growth and tech. Portfolio is up 5.4% with all five positions intact. Deploying remaining $598 in cash into UCTT — the only score-100 candidate with RSI still in the healthy 55–70 momentum zone rather than overbought territory, making it the cleanest entry among top picks.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a broad risk-on session on May 5, 2026, with the NASDAQ gaining +0.8% and the S&P 500 rising +0.6%, driven by continued strength in technology and growth-oriented sectors. Momentum stocks showing volume surges broadly outperformed, pointing to active institutional accumulation rather than retail-driven moves. The constructive tape with no major macro headwinds suggests the near-term uptrend remains intact.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年5月5日，美股全面上漲，風險偏好明顯升溫，那斯達克指數漲0.8%，標普500指數漲0.6%，科技及成長股繼續領跑。成交量急增的動能股表現尤為突出，顯示機構資金正積極入市，並非單純散戶追捧。整體市場未見重大宏觀風險，短線升勢格局仍然穩固。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge happens when a stock trades at 1.5x or more its normal 20-day average volume. When price rises on unusually high volume, it signals that large institutional players — mutual funds, hedge funds — are actively buying, giving the move credibility. A breakout on low volume is suspect; the same move on a volume surge is far more trustworthy.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量急增是指某股票的單日成交量達到20日均量的1.5倍或以上。若股價上漲的同時出現異常大成交量，代表基金或對沖基金等大型機構正積極買入，令升勢更具說服力。低成交量的突破往往不可靠；相反，伴隨成交量急增的突破則可信度高得多。
